creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

Unless you can provide a patch with an upgrade or at least be willing to work on one at reviews.freebsd.org with helps of port committers, opening PR's and asking for a port to be updated is not a way to go - port maintainers do get email notification about outdated ports and if they haven't reacted, the only result here is polluting PR's pool.
